message:
Merge PR #2395: Fix dog_molecule JSON parsing for bd show --children output

bd show --children returns a map keyed by parent ID, not a bare array.
Add parseChildrenJSON() that handles both formats for forward compatibility.
Includes comprehensive test coverage.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2395
Author: apl97

Co-Authored-By: apl97 <apl97@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
